name: Jasmine
description: Behavior-driven JavaScript testing framework with no external dependencies, historically used with Angular and popular for specs-style tests.

seo.title: Jasmine — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Jasmine: Behavior-driven JavaScript testing framework with no external dependencies, historically used with Angular and popular for specs-style tests.

when_to_use: Spec-style unit tests for JavaScript without dependencies
Behavior-driven test organization for Angular projects
Custom equality testers for domain object comparisons

pros: Still the default in many Angular projects
cons: Losing mindshare rapidly to Jest and Vitest
review.verdict: Solid but clearly past its prime, mostly justified today for legacy Angular codebases.
review.best_for: Existing Angular or AngularJS projects with sizeable Jasmine suites
review.not_for: New JavaScript projects where Vitest or native runners are better defaults

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
